top_signals.title: AllianzGI’s Zeng on US Rates & Bond Yields
top_signals.summary: AllianzGI Fixed Income CIO Jenny Zeng warns bond markets may be somewhat overpricing inflation expectations. Meanwhile, she notes that while Fed hikes remain on the table, US energy independence and a gradually softening tariff impact could mitigate the need for dramatic action. (Corrects with full name of company.)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: DOE issues order to keep Michigan coal-fired power plant operating
top_signals.summary: Order directs J.H. Campbell coal-power plant in West Olive to take all steps necessary to remain available to operate and to minimize costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
